text_jp:
そうさ、いつかまた、会える
俺たちは同じ道の上にいる{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
…未来へ繋がって行く。絆。心。
俺の…俺たちの戦いは無駄じゃない{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 戻ろう。おやっさんが心配してる{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: …帰ろう…俺たちは俺たちの戦いに…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 人知れず、人類の未来を影で支える戦い{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 光…人々の賞賛…を浴びる事のない戦い{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
影…闇から生まれた者だからこそ…
俺たちは光を目指す{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
俺の歩みに終りはない
正義という道に…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}
